a: Use Wi-Fi Infrastructure to automatically share Wi-Fi network credentials after establishing a Bluetooth connection.

The authorization state for sharing the current Wi-Fi network with an accessory.
The person allowed the accessory to use the network.
The person chose not to share the network with the accessory.
The person hasn’t decided whether to share the network with the accessory.
A controller that enables your container app to control network-sharing functions with connected accessories.
An enumeration that represents the authorization state for sharing Wi-Fi networks with a given accessory.
The person has granted authorization to share Wi-Fi networks with the accessory, but you must request approval for each network individually.
The person has granted authorization to share Wi-Fi networks with the accessory automatically, without requiring approval for each network.
The person has chosen not to share Wi-Fi networks with the accessory.
The person has not yet made a choice about sharing Wi-Fi networks with the accessory.
Error codes for Wi-Fi network-sharing functionality.
Indicates the person didn’t grant the accessory authorization to access network information.
Indicates the person hasn’t configured the accessory on this system.
Indicates the accessory isn’t connected to the host.
Indicates the accessory doesn’t use the required transport security, such as Bluetooth Secure Connections.
Indicates your app can’t perform the requested operation because it isn’t running in the foreground.
Indicates the person hasn’t granted your app permission to use the shared networks API for the accessory.
Indicates the app failed to communicate with the shared network system.
Indicates a general error occurred.
Indicates the accessory didn’t send a scan response.
Indicates the system found no sharable networks nearby.
Indicates the system found no matching scan request pending for the accessory.
Indicates the requested operation timed out.
Indicates the accessory exceeded the maximum number of requests.
Indicates the device doesn’t support Wi-Fi network sharing.
A provider that delivers updated Wi-Fi network information to your app extension.
A Wi-Fi access point the host is currently connected to, which may be shared with a connected accessory.

A data link to a Wi-Fi Access Point.
